cascadeNuxes.title: Introducing Gemini 3.1 Pro!
cascadeNuxes.body: Available in the latest version of Antigravity.

cascadeNuxes.title: Selecting a model
cascadeNuxes.body: Click here to browse the available models.

cascadeNuxes.title: Tip: Customize the Agent
cascadeNuxes.body: By adding rules, you can change how the Agent generates suggestions and writes code.

cascadeNuxes.title: Comment on artifacts
cascadeNuxes.body: Select content within artifacts to leave a comment for the agent.

cascadeNuxes.title: Comment on files
cascadeNuxes.body: Select text within files to leave a comment for the agent.

cascadeNuxes.title: Browser Use
cascadeNuxes.body: The Agent runs a Chrome instance that you both can use.

currentTier.name: Antigravity
currentTier.description: Gemini-powered code suggestions and chat in multiple IDEs

privacyNotice.noticeText:
This notice and our Privacy Policy - https://policies.google.com/privacy - describe how Gemini Code Assist for individuals handles your data. Please read them carefully.

When you use Gemini Code Assist for individuals, Google collects your prompts, related code, generated output, code edits, related feature usage information, and your feedback to provide, improve, and develop Google products and services and machine learning technologies.

To help with quality and improve our products (such as generative machine-learning models), human reviewers may read, annotate, and process the data collected above. We take steps to protect your privacy as part of this process. This includes disconnecting the data from your Google Account before reviewers see or annotate it, and storing those disconnected copies for up to 18 months. Please don't submit confidential information or any data you wouldn't want a reviewer to see or Google to use to improve our products, services, and machine-learning technologies.

If you don't want this data used to improve Google's machine learning models, you can opt out below.

currentTier.upgradeSubscriptionText: Upgrade to get 1,500 requests per day with Agent Mode and Gemini CLI, access to Gemini in Google Cloud, plus $1,000 in Google Cloud credits

privacyNotice.noticeText:
This notice and our Privacy Policy - https://policies.google.com/privacy - describe how Gemini Code Assist for individuals handles your data. Please read them carefully.

When you use Gemini Code Assist for individuals, Google collects your prompts, related code, generated output, code edits, related feature usage information, and your feedback to provide, improve, and develop Google products and services and machine learning technologies.

To help with quality and improve our products (such as generative machine-learning models), human reviewers may read, annotate, and process the data collected above. We take steps to protect your privacy as part of this process. This includes disconnecting the data from your Google Account before reviewers see or annotate it, and storing those disconnected copies for up to 18 months. Please don't submit confidential information or any data you wouldn't want a reviewer to see or Google to use to improve our products, services, and machine-learning technologies.

If you don't want this data used to improve Google's machine learning models, you can opt out below.
